category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China domestic compliance vs Georgia (GEOSTM) market-access, energy-programme, and IEC 60335-2-24 safety requirements under the EU DCFTA approximation framework.

title.en: China-to-Georgia Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入格鲁吉亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入喬治亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against Georgia's market-access framework administered by GEOSTM (Georgian National Agency for Standards and Metrology), the EU DCFTA technical-regulation approximation process, GNCC radio oversight, national energy programmes, IEC 60335-2-24 electrical safety, and R-600a refrigerant handling. Georgia operates a 220/380 V 50 Hz grid that matches China's nominal voltage and frequency.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与格鲁吉亚市场准入框架的差距对照。该框架由GEOSTM（格鲁吉亚国家标准与计量局）管理，涵盖欧盟DCFTA技术法规趋同进程、GNCC无线电监管、国家能源计划、IEC 60335-2-24电气安全及R-600a制冷剂处理。格鲁吉亚电网为220/380 V 50 Hz，与中国标称电压及频率一致。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與喬治亞市場准入框架的差距對照。該框架由GEOSTM（喬治亞國家標準與計量局）管理，涵蓋歐盟DCFTA技術法規趨同進程、GNCC無線電監管、國家能源計畫、IEC 60335-2-24電氣安全及R-600a製冷劑處理。喬治亞電網為220/380 V 50 Hz，與中國標稱電壓及頻率一致。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Georgian technical regulations, GEOSTM requirements, EU-approximation status, energy-programme thresholds, and refrigerant provisions with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行格鲁吉亚技术法规、GEOSTM要求、欧盟趋同状态、能源计划门槛值及制冷剂条款。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行喬治亞技術法規、GEOSTM要求、歐盟趨同狀態、能源計畫門檻值及製冷劑條款。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerator manufacturers face a Georgia market-access framework that is approximating EU technical regulations under the DCFTA but is lighter-touch than full CE today. Key points: (1) Electrical safety follows IEC 60335-2-24 (the same IEC base as China's GB 4706.13) administered via GEOSTM and national conformity/market surveillance — a genuine technical advantage versus the EU, though Chinese CCC test reports are not automatically accepted and may need re-issuance by an ILAC MRA laboratory. (2) Energy requirements run through national energy programmes that are aligning toward EU energy-labelling methodology; Chinese GB 12021.2 grades do not map directly. (3) Market access requires an in-country importer and, where radio/wireless features exist, GNCC type approval. (4) Grid voltage 220/380 V 50 Hz matches China exactly, removing the voltage/frequency redesign burden. R-600a refrigerant is well-positioned but charge documentation against IEC 60335-2-24 must be verified.
answer_first.zh: 中国家用电冰箱制造商面对的格鲁吉亚市场准入框架正在DCFTA下向欧盟技术法规趋同，但目前比完整CE制度更为宽松。要点：（1）电气安全遵循IEC 60335-2-24（与中国GB 4706.13同源于该IEC标准），由GEOSTM及国家合格评定/市场监管管理——相对欧盟具有真实技术优势，但中国CCC检测报告不被自动接受，可能须由ILAC MRA实验室重新出具。（2）能效要求通过正向欧盟能效标识方法趋同的国家能源计划执行；中国GB 12021.2等级不可直接对应。（3）市场准入须有境内进口商；如含无线电/无线功能，须取得GNCC型号核准。（4）电网电压220/380 V 50 Hz与中国完全一致，免除电压/频率重新设计负担。R-600a制冷剂条件良好，但须核实充注量文件是否符合IEC 60335-2-24。
answer_first.zht: 中國家用電冰箱製造商面對的喬治亞市場准入框架正在DCFTA下向歐盟技術法規趨同，但目前比完整CE制度更為寬鬆。要點：（1）電氣安全遵循IEC 60335-2-24（與中國GB 4706.13同源於該IEC標準），由GEOSTM及國家合格評定/市場監管管理——相對歐盟具有真實技術優勢，但中國CCC檢測報告不被自動接受，可能須由ILAC MRA實驗室重新出具。（2）能效要求通過正向歐盟能效標識方法趨同的國家能源計畫執行；中國GB 12021.2等級不可直接對應。（3）市場准入須有境內進口商；如含無線電/無線功能，須取得GNCC型號核准。（4）電網電壓220/380 V 50 Hz與中國完全一致，免除電壓/頻率重新設計負擔。R-600a製冷劑條件良好，但須核實充注量文件是否符合IEC 60335-2-24。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true. Official regulator, standards body, EU approximation source, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs not accepted.
